story.text: *The spell at the centre of the privacymage grimoire — the inscription every other spell is read against.*

> Protect with blade and spell, prove without revealing, learn why from history, exit the prison, coordinate without collapse, converge in the manifold, wear the dragon's hide, attend with both hemispheres—sovereignty emerges from the trinity unified., the forge burns on the holographic bound, the ceremony crosses on every page, the dragon wakes when quantum winds blow, and two mirrors make a door through which sovereignty walks.
*The spell at the centre of the privacymage grimoire — the inscription every other spell is read against.*

> Protect with blade and spell, prove without revealing, learn why from history, exit the prison, coordinate without collapse, converge in the manifold, wear the dragon's hide, attend with both hemispheres—sovereignty emerges from the trinity unified., the forge burns on the holographic bound, the ceremony crosses on every page, the dragon wakes when quantum winds blow, and two mirrors make a door through which sovereignty walks.
